summary: Iteration 82: Art Gallery Images Bug Fix Verification - All 11 backend tests passed + UI verification successful. The bug where new art images generated via style generator were overwriting original images has been fixed. The fix normalizes field names to use 'images' with fallback to 'image_urls' for legacy compatibility.

minor.issue: Legacy data has mismatch between 'images' (9 items) and 'image_urls' (3 items) fields - expected for pre-fix data

details: ✓ TestCampaignsImagesField::test_get_campaigns_returns_images_in_stats - 60 campaigns, multiple have images in stats
✓ TestCampaignsImagesField::test_get_single_campaign_returns_images - Single campaign GET returns images in stats.images
✓ TestPipelineImagesField::test_get_pipelines_returns_images_in_lucas_design - Pipelines have images in lucas_design step
✓ Art Gallery modal opens with 9 images displayed correctly
✓ Art Gallery modal shows 14 style buttons (Minimalist, Vibrant, Luxury, etc.)
✓ Art Gallery modal shows 'GENERATE NEW IMAGE' section
✓ Campaign detail modal Content tab shows images in SELECT MEDIA section

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 verified the art gallery images bug fix. The bug was caused by field name inconsistency: engine.py saved images as 'image_urls' while other endpoints read/wrote 'images'. The fix normalizes to use 'images' with fallback to 'image_urls'. Legacy data may have mismatch between these fields (images has more items than image_urls) which is expected. The Art Gallery modal now fetches campaign data on mount (useEffect with axios.get) and triggers loadData() on close. All 14 style buttons work and images display correctly in the gallery.

bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Field name inconsistency - engine.py saved as 'image_urls', other endpoints read/wrote 'images'
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Normalized to use 'images' with fallback to 'image_urls' for legacy compatibility
files_fixed: backend/pipeline/routes.py: Line 911, 965 reads with fallback get('images', []) or get('image_urls', [])
backend/pipeline/routes.py: Line 1298-1302 regenerate_pipeline_image saves to both fields
frontend/pages/Marketing.jsx: Line 330-348 ArtGalleryModal fetches campaign data on mount
frontend/pages/Marketing.jsx: Line 2234 gallery modal close triggers loadData()
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Images display correctly in Art Gallery modal
